title: Alias the Doctor
writer: Imre Földes, Houston Branch, Charles Kenyon
actors: Richard Barthelmess, Marian Marsh, Norman Foster
plot: Karl is the workaholic adopted son while Stephan is the lazy one. They both go to Munich to study medicine and Karl is at the top of the class while Stephan is barely passing. When Stephan's actions causes the death of Anna, Karl ...
